name: Scarab
description: A small harmless beetle prized for its Twinkling Shells. It does not threaten the player, but catching it before it flees or burrows is a real challenge.
behavior: It walks slowly when calm, but the moment it detects danger it accelerates dramatically and keeps running until it escapes or burrows. Its body twinkles like buried treasure, so it often gives itself away by shimmer before sound.
interactionWithPlayer: It never attacks the player: it only flees. If cornered or forced to run for too long, it burrows and disappears, which heavily punishes players trying to chase it in melee.
interactionWithCreatures: It also runs from nearby creatures. That means another fight or a passing predator can ruin a hunt even before the player gets close.
strategy: The ideal play is a ranged one-shot. Because it is weak to every element, staff weapons or a strong crossbow work extremely well. If it has already seen you, sometimes running the opposite way helps prevent an early burrow.
respawnInfo: 3 days by default. In the Undershed it takes 2 days.
specialTraits: The Undershed pipe variants cannot burrow because of the pipe layout and have a more generous loot table, but they also cannot be stolen from.
